note: Promoted iteration spawned by the iteration-1 EARLY shadow trigger (engine_self_modifying). Phase 1+2 skipped per Decide outcome 2. Its Phase-3 findings ARE the shadow's new findings, plus the blinded Step 3.5 fix-delta gate findings over 81ad899a..54eb698a.
phase3_findings_source: iter-1.json shadow.phase3_findings (14 new) + Step 3.5 fix-delta gate (5)

fix_delta_gate_findings.description: The iteration-1 F3 fix closed only ONE route to the record-aborting shape. A MULTI-DOCUMENT sidecar still lost the entire telemetry record: jq streams N documents, filters each, and exits 0, so exit-status branching never fires, the capture is non-empty, and --argjson rejects the N-document string. Orchestrator-reproduced: rc=2, ZERO bytes of record. The comment added by that same fix claimed the concatenation shape was closed - false against HEAD.
The apply-gate comment tells a maintainer to 'restore the claude_args splice'; the splice was never removed. Corroborated independently by two shadow reviewers.
compose-applied-effort.sh's contract header describes composition behavior that no default configuration reaches, because the numbered behavior list omits the new default-OFF gate entirely.

The F2 six-shape loop's 'null' row is VACUOUS - it passes identically with the guarded bug reintroduced, because a JSON null value already took the honest arm under the old top-level-only filter. The added comment presented it as a shape the fix rescued.

The effort enum is hardcoded in the jq program in lib/efficiency-trace.sh, duplicating VALID_EFFORTS in resolve-review-overrides.py (the producer) with no coupling pin - a new effort level would be emitted by the producer and silently dropped by the recorder.

fix_decisions.evidence: jq -s + `length == 1` arity guard; reproduced before (rc=2, 0 bytes) and after (rc=0, record intact, session-fallback) across a 7-shape matrix with the valid single-document positive control still yielding agent-definition/low
row kept as a regression guard; the overclaiming comment replaced with an explicit not-vacuity caveat naming it as such
enum mirror still uncoupled; no pin added this iteration
cloud tier row, application-point glossary row and the SHIPPED blockquote all restated as built-but-gated-off, naming the shape gap as the reason
rewritten so the public CHANGELOG describes the telemetry half shipping and the application half deferred
all three byte-identical copies updated together

#700 F1 pin at 0,0,0 across all three workflows; went RED on first run against my own explanatory comments, which proved the operand was wrong (a mention is not an arming) - resolved by rewording the pointer per CLAUDE.md, never by weakening the pin
workflow helper-absent branch still silent and still co-gates the stale-sidecar clear; needs a workflow edit alongside the F-4 trusted-source ladder
no end-to-end row driving the real resolver through the composer
vendor-skew total-telemetry-loss path for lib/efficiency-trace.jq still uncovered
overlaps iter-1 F-11; still pinned by literals only
DEVFLOW_AE_APPLY not threaded from a trusted config key; design decision left to the operator
trusted-source ladder: carried forward from iteration 1, still NOT implemented
